inputs.label: Bill Subtotal
inputs.businessContext: The total bill amount before service charge and taxes.

businessContext_i18n.en: The total bill amount before service charge and taxes.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hizmet bedeli ve vergilerden önceki toplam fatura tutarı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der gesamte Rechnungsbetrag vor Servicegebühren und Steuern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le montant total de la facture avant les frais de service et les taxes.

inputs.label: Service Charge Rate
inputs.businessContext: Common service charge rate, e.g., 18% for large parties.

businessContext_i18n.en: Common service charge rate, e.g., 18% for large parties.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yaygın hizmet bedeli oranı, örn. büyük gruplar için %18.
businessContext_i18n.de: Üblicher Servicegebührensatz, z. B. 18 % für große Gruppen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de frais de service courant, par exemple 18 % pour les grands groupes.

inputs.label: Minimum Service Charge
inputs.businessContext: A minimum service charge to be applied regardless of percentage.

businessContext_i18n.en: A minimum service charge to be applied regardless of percentage.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yüzdeye bakılmaksızın uygulanacak minimum hizmet bedeli.
businessContext_i18n.de: Ein Mindestservicebetrag, der unabhängig vom Prozentsatz angewendet wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Un montant minimum de frais de service à appliquer quel que soit le pourcentage.

inputs.label: Party Size
inputs.businessContext: Number of people in the party; some restaurants apply service charge only for parties above a threshold.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of people in the party; some restaurants apply service charge only for parties above a threshold.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gruptaki kişi sayısı; bazı restoranlar hizmet bedelini yalnızca belirli bir eşiğin üzerindeki gruplara uygular.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Personen in der Gruppe; einige Restaurants erheben Servicegebühren nur für Gruppen über einem Schwellenwert.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de personnes dans le groupe ; certains restaurants n'appliquent les frais de service qu'au-delà d'un seuil.

inputs.label: Service Charge Threshold
inputs.businessContext: If party size is above this threshold, service charge is mandatory.

businessContext_i18n.en: If party size is above this threshold, service charge is mandatory.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Grup büyüklüğü bu eşiğin üzerindeyse hizmet bedeli zorunludur.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wenn die Personenzahl diesen Schwellenwert überschreitet, ist die Servicegebühr verpflichtend.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Si la taille du groupe dépasse ce seuil, les frais de service sont obligatoires.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
